item.title: Docker Minimize Base Image
item.author: Author
item.description: Base and Parent Image Type Description Base Image A base image has FROM scratch in its Dockerfile. Parent Image A parent image is the image that your image is based on. It refers to the contents of the FROM directive in the Dockerfile. Base Image Choose Rules Authenticity Authenticity Check OFFICIAL IMAGE on docker hub. Up-to-date Up-to-date Check update time on docker hub.
